content: We can reframe Self-Refine not just as a generic post-generation improvement pipeline, but as a minimal base implementation that can be enhanced by integrating multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, to solve the common problem of self-feedback getting stuck in local optimization traps. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data, while adding the diversity of critical feedback that comes from inconsistent problem-solving perspectives.
